policy.physicalCreation: Create continent and region indexes first. Country parents and child repositories remain planned until maintainers and datasets are ready.
policy.ownerRequirement: Create repositories only while authenticated as the target owner or an organization admin. Do not let GitHub CLI fall back to the current personal account.
policy.noRawAddress: Do not store raw personal addresses, recipient records, private coordinates, witness data, or private keys in public repositories.
policy.heavyData: Keep building polygons, coordinates, search indexes, tiles, and OSM/Overture extracts in external content-addressed packs.

repositories.description: AGID Americas index for North America, Central America, the Caribbean, South America, territories, and staged country packs.
AGID North America index for Americas country and territory repository coordination.
